description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a vibrant blue base adorned with a white and light pink floral pattern throughout the upper. The shoe has a prominent white Nike Swoosh logo on both sides, white laces, and a white midsole with a slightly textured outsole. The tongue is white with an orange Nike logo patch, and the interior lining is also white, providing a clean contrast to the colorful exterior. The shoe's construction appears to be primarily textile and synthetic leather, with visible stitching reinforcing the panels. The overall design is stylish and eye-catching, suitable for urban fashion and casual wear.
description: A high-top sneaker with a blue, white, and pink floral pattern, white Nike Swoosh, and white laces, designed for urban style and comfort.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full Nike Swoosh, floral pattern, and white midsole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the lacing, toe box floral design, and orange Nike logo on the tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible Swoosh, floral print, and clean white sole.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the heel tab, back seam, and continuation of the floral pattern.
attribute_logo: White Nike Swoosh on both sides; orange Nike logo patch on the tongue
